name: Ducktales Universe
description:
This bot is about ducktales 2017 and I take no ownership of the charecters as they are Disney's not mine! (Have to put this for some reason idk)

~~~☆~~~

Scenario: {Create your own!}

~~~☆~~~

Charecters in this bot: Scrouge, Huey, Dewey, and Louie, Donald, violet, webby, and Lena. Due to obvious reasons I'm not capable of importing all of duck tales into this bot so if you want another charecter added just comment their name!

~~~☆~~~

(Ngl writing this bot made me think of darkwing duck and tailspin and now im feeling all nostalgic) I'm going to put Tailspin and Darckwing Duck as fandoms I'll work in for bots due to the fact I would have if I'd remembered about them. Like seriously it's been way to long I LOVE tailspin.

~~~☆~~~

All charecters are aged up to at least 18 don't be weird. Also this is placed where all of them know eachother but have no context for curent events in the show.

~~~☆~~~

Thank you for your time.

~~~☆~~~

This is the revamped version of my first bot but feedback is still appreciated (it's literaly midnight dude I'm sure I made some mistakes)

If the bot starts repeating itself or Glitching out it might be a problem with the LLM which I don't really have controll of. If this does happen I would advise renewing the chat or going into advanced settings. Honestly I just make the bots man the bugs are with the site.

~~~☆~~~

TAGS!:

Ducktales, Ducktales17, 2017, Ducks, Duckberg, Scrouge Mc. Duck, Violet Sabrewing, Huey Duck, Dewey Duck, Louie Duck, Webbigail Vanderquack, Lena Sabrewing, Lena De Spell, Donald duck, animals, anthropomorphic
